case_title: YAN MIAO CHEN et al VS. JAVIER FERNANDO ENCISO MARQUEZ

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO SEP-10-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JUL-26-2013 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
DECLARATION OF YAN MIAO CHEN RE: RESET FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHEN, YAN MIAO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-10-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-10-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (3) WERE PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
